input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12
            TITLE: endurance event

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12: ENDURANCE EVENT
D.12 ENDURANCE EVENT 
The Endurance event evaluates the overall performance of the vehicle and tests the durability 
and reliability.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 134 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

RULE: d.12.3
            TITLE: endurance run order

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.3: Endurance Run Order
D.12.3 Endurance Run Order 
The Endurance Run Order is established to let vehicles of similar speed potential be on track 
together to reduce the need for passing.

final_answer: D.12 ENDURANCE EVENT The Endurance event evaluates the overall performance of the vehicle and tests the durability and reliability.
